content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ Reinforces literary themes of unreliable narration.
✔ Adds a layer of deception and roleplay.
✔ Makes the course history dynamic—players shape the record.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 6.6

1. Should one archetype (or item) have the ability to nullify a weekly curse?

✔ If yes, should it be an item like the Holy Grail, or should it be a unique character like The Purifier?

2. Should an XP “redistribution event” happen at the midpoint of the semester to rebalance power?

✔ Example: The Bottom 5 XP players unite to challenge the Top XP players in a forced showdown.
✔ If they win, XP is redistributed in their favor.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 335 (chunk 335/555)
